finance.title: Different voices in product, policy and hiring change crypto outcomes, panelists tell Consensus Miami
finance.blurb: Senior leaders from Mastercard, the Crypto Council for Innovation and Clerisy said the right people in the right rooms can reshape internal decisions, citing examples from stablecoin-linked cards and financial access to staking-policy framing in Washington.

finance.title: AI agents are breaking web economics, but Cloudflare says x402 can help
finance.blurb: The company’s Chief Strategy Officer said that more than half of internet traffic is now non-human, but that the x402 Foundation is building the rails for a "golden age of content."

finance.title: Kraken eyes IPO as it partners with MoneyGram to bridge crypto-to-cash gap
finance.blurb: Payward and Kraken co-CEO Arjun Sethi says the exchange is “80% ready” to go public, as a new partnership with MoneyGram aims to expand access to digital assets by solving last-mile cash conversion.

finance.title: State Street says institutions want improved blockchain security in wake of recent DeFi attacks
finance.blurb: Angus Fletcher, State Street’s head of digital assets said the young crypto industry needs to find solutions now before trillions in RWAs come on-chain.
